== Notes for [[Item:Q116075|Q116075]] ==

=== GEDCOM Source ===

Eduardo Banús Banús Web Site <p>Árbol genealógico de MyHeritage</p><p>Sitio familiar: Banús Web Site</p>Árbol genealógico: 21447241-2 Smart Matching 21447241-2 MH:S500013
=== GEDCOM Source ===
https://www.myheritage.es/person-6511307_181140132_181140132/sancha-martinez 3 Individuao añadido por consecuencia de confirmar un Smart Match Smart Matching 1:181140132-6-511307:0

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
